original_text:
### Required Elements Within Sections
- Clinical claims require footnote markers (†) with footnote text clearly separated and noticeably smaller (§1.2).
- Patient quotes: attributed as `- [Name], LISRAYA patient`, italic or distinguished styling, paired with warm lifestyle imagery.
- Priovant logo, copyright line, ® legal line, job code [mm/yy], Indication, and ISI all live in the **locked header/footer components — never reproduce in sections.**

quotes: Clinical claims require footnote markers (†) with footnote text clearly separated and noticeably smaller
Clinical claims require footnote markers (†) with footnote text clearly separated and noticeably smaller (§1.2).

rules.intent: Ensure medical claims are properly substantiated with legible, distinct footnote citations.
rules.rule_text: Clinical claims require footnote markers (†) with corresponding footnote text that is clearly separated and noticeably smaller (type_scale.footnote = 12px/18px).

quotes: patient quotes: attributed as `- [Name], LISRAYA patient`, italic or distinguished styling, paired with warm lifestyle imagery.
Patient quotes: attributed as `- [Name], LISRAYA patient`, italic or distinguished styling, paired with warm lifestyle imagery.

rules.intent: Ensure consistent presentation, legal compliance, and warm tone for real patient testimonies.
rules.rule_text: Patient quotes must be formatted with italic or distinguished styling, attributed specifically as '- [Name], LISRAYA patient', and paired with warm lifestyle imagery.

quotes: Priovant logo, copyright line, ® legal line, job code [mm/yy], Indication, and ISI all live in the **locked header/footer components — never reproduce in sections.**
Priovant logo, copyright line, ® legal line, job code [mm/yy], Indication, and ISI all live in the **locked header/footer components — never reproduce in sections.**

rules.intent: Avoid duplication of legally mandated metadata and clinical/brand anchors in content sections.
rules.rule_text: The Priovant logo, copyright line, ® legal line, job code [mm/yy], Indication, and ISI must only exist in the locked top_matter and end_matter components; never reproduce these elements within custom body sections.
